description: Parity assertions for the one-shot context capability (RFC-0101). CLI `mycelium context --format json` must equal the MCP `mycelium_context` structured response byte-for-byte. Both surfaces call the single shared builder `mycelium_core::context::build_payload`, so equality holds by construction rather than by hand-synced duplicate logic.

cases.name: natural_language_happy_path
cases.parity_invariant: CLI JSON == MCP JSON for the full seven-key RFC-0101 contract, including routing="natural" and the candidates list.

cases.name: not_found
cases.parity_invariant: Both surfaces return verdict="NOT_FOUND" with identical empty arrays and the same agent_summary.next_step.

cases.name: edge_kinds_imports
cases.parity_invariant: CLI --edge-kinds calls,imports == MCP edge_kinds:[calls,imports]; both expand the same edge set and label edges identically via EdgeKind::as_str().

cases.name: hyphae_selector_routing
cases.parity_invariant: A Hyphae selector task routes through the DSL evaluator on both surfaces (routing="hyphae", candidates=[]) and yields identical entry_points.
